'''Andrew Brocklehurst''' (born 6 March 1983) is a former [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a [[second-row (rugby league)|second-row]].

Brocklehurst joined [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]] in 2004 from [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]]. He has also played for [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] and is a coach at his former amateur side.

In September 2008, it was announced that Brocklehurst had joined [[Barrow Raiders]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.barrowrlfc.com/barrow_rugby_newsdetails.asp?newsID%3D225 |title=Barrow Raiders RFLC |accessdate=2009-09-09 |url-status = dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20081003103650/http://www.barrowrlfc.com/barrow_rugby_newsdetails.asp?newsID=225 |archivedate=2008-10-03 }}</ref> On 30 June 2009, it was announced that his contract with Barrow Raiders had been terminated "following a serious breach of club discipline amounting to gross misconduct".<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.barrowrlfc.com/barrow_rugby_newsdetails.asp?newsID%3D483|title=Barrow Raiders RLFC - Andrew Brocklehurst|accessdate=2009-09-09|url-status = dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110707213300/http://www.barrowrlfc.com/barrow_rugby_newsdetails.asp?newsID=483|archivedate=2011-07-07}}</ref>
